hotel_name: Sofitel Am Alten Wall Hamburg Hotel

reviews.title: Best location , price ok
reviews.text: good
reviews.positives: The hotel location is super convenient for business, room condition was o.k. price is reasonable

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: I left my mobile phone charger and struggled to even connect with the front desk people.  Eventually my admin person helped me out but we decided to just put that aside not keen to pursue further

reviews.title: If the weather is unstable people go crazy
reviews.text: There is always a better hotel in hamburg.

reviews.title: Great bed!
reviews.text: Love the super comfortable bed. Always a great nights sleep. Convenient walking distance around central Hamburg

reviews.title: A nice stay
reviews.text: The room is comfortable and the location is very convenient with metro stations nearby. Staff are nice and helpful. I would recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Reliable hotel in a good location
reviews.text: I was pretty happy with my choice. the location is good.  It is in a nice part of Hamburg. the hotel was clean and modern - and pretty new. The room was comfortable - as you would expect from this chain and for this price.  I didnt make use of any faciliites so hard to comment.  I would say it was a reliable hotel in a good location, of international standards.  I would go back but I would also take a look at other options too.

reviews.title: Good location for shopping
reviews.text: This hotel is located a very nice area, easy to go to the central area and the staff are nice. We enjoyed our 3 nights staying in this hotel.
reviews.positives: Good location, nice staff and comfy room

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel - Staff member pulls it down
reviews.text:
Loverly Hotel, great food and bar and excellent facilities.

Selina on the booking in desk has a horrible attitude and really poor customer service and is a real let down to the hotel.

reviews.title: Great city central location
reviews.text: Staff was friendly and helpful.  Arrived at the hotel much earlier than expected and they assisted me with getting into a room earlier than check in time.  Room was small, but I guess to be expected in Europe.  Bathroom/shower was very small but adequate.  GREAT location walking to city center and on a nice canal

reviews.title: Nice & Cosy
reviews.text: The view is lovely and breakfast spread is superb.
reviews.positives: Good spread of breakfast, clean rooms & facilities are well maintained

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: it is good hotel. but maybe during the christmas holiday. the service is a little un satisfied.

reviews.title: great hotel very convenient place
reviews.text: In the middle of shopping area and restaurants and very nice room.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: I went there for my business trip, the hotel is very near to my business partners' office, I quite enjoy the environment there although the room is quite small, can only accommodate 2 persons, therefore, no choice I have to book another room for my daughter. Overall quite satisfied with the stay.
reviews.positives: New city area, near to business partners

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: I followed my parent to visit their business partners which are all near to the hotel area. Location is very convenience, just few minutes away from business area.  Like the hotel environment although the room is small. Overall quite satisfied with our stay.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: I like the location and Sofitel bed a lot. The spa is a nice plus. Rooms are unfortunately small and not very comfortable
reviews.response:
Dear Antonia,
Thank you so much for this positive guest review. We are more than happy that you have chosen us for your stay in Hamburg and that you were able to enjoy every moment of it.  One of our main focus points regarding our room amenities is indeed the bed and bedding set. That’s why it’s glad to hear that our exclusive MyBed concept turned your night into a magnificent sleeping experience. 
We hope we can welcome you very soon in our hotel again and would like to invite you to follow us on Facebook or Instagram to stay tuned about the latest news from our hotel.
Best regards,
Your Sofitel Hamburg Alter Wall Team

reviews.title: very clean and nice hotel
reviews.text: Great - the pool looks better on the pics then in real - very small actually - the locker rooms are not the cleanest - the rooms are great and very comfortable. The ART in the room (privat looking real pictures of families close to the bed) is not ok - I feel like sleeping in someones bed instead of a hotel bed which I would prefer.

reviews.title: Perfect location
reviews.text:
Very clean & modern hotel.
Booked for 3 nights, first night couldn't sleep well because Our room just exactly beside the train. Very noisy.
Staff so helpful & changed Our room.
Some of the lamps didn't work out, NO toothbrush.
Swimming pool is beautiful, location is perfect!

reviews.title: Very good location and good for shoppers
reviews.positives: very good location, comfort room and good service

reviews.title: Good Business Hotel
reviews.text: I chose this hotel for its location in the city center of hamburg. It didnt disappoint here. The rooms were spacious and tastefully decorated. Fitness center and spa were nice even though the pool was not made for serious swimming. The breakfast was rich and choices were plenty. I found the price of 29 EUR for one person for the breakfast buffet a little too high by German standards. All in all still a good experience and there are plenty of restaurants, cafes and bars in walking distance which could fix the flaws.

reviews.title: luxurious hotel
reviews.text: the hotel is located very centrally in the city and right next to the neuer wall, which is the main shopping street for the city. as would be expected under the sofitel name, the hotel is quite luxurious with excellent service. the exercise facilities are, however, a little sparse, though the dining and bar areas are quite nice. service was excellent, and the rooms quite comfortable, thought the layout design was somewhat strange and might not have been the maximal overall use of the space. overall it is a nice and comfortable stay, though a bit pricy for what is actually offered.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel on the canal with fabulous service.
reviews.text: It was perfect service,  position and   canal side bar.  Concierge superbly helpful.
reviews.positives: Loved the canal side bar and health club

reviews.title: Great Hotel with excellent location
reviews.text: we love the big room!

reviews.title: Very good and convenient hotel
reviews.text: everything's good
reviews.positives: Excellent rooms and breakfast, good service

reviews.title: Great Location and super comfy
reviews.text: It is not always easy to find a bathtub 🛀 n hotels and finding one that was almost 6 feet in length made up for the fact there is as no steam room or hot tub. Perfect location for getting the S1 to or from the airport, near great bookshops, galleries and historical sights.

reviews.title: Super Nice Hotel
reviews.text: The staff super nice, ok location. wifi ok. Super clean

reviews.title: super
reviews.text: Breakfast was very expensive but you can find nice places for breakfast around the hotel.

reviews.title: sufficient service with exellant location
reviews.text: very good location,high quality service.reasonable price during messe period.will choose this hotel again, nice experience!

reviews.title: Excellent, highly recommend.
reviews.text: Beautiful spa, ideal location, fantastic breakfast, friendly staff.

reviews.title: Efficient, ultra modern hotel
reviews.text: efficient, clean, modern, spacious hotel in a desirable  area, very nice breakfast restaurant and near S Bahn----but a little soulless in my opinion when compared to its Lisbon smaller sister.

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: Love the room, view from my window, location near rathaus. Love it!!!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: We got an uprade (for free) and the room was amazing. The kids got a teddy on their bed really nice gestus. The view in the room was beautiful wauw . Pool area was nice after a day with shopping. Location is perfect a lot of lovely restaurants close to the hotel. Breakfast was so delicious - I recommemd this hotel for everyone who wants to spoil themselves with something extra 👍

reviews.title: Gorgeous pearl in Hamburg
reviews.text: The staff were excellent in all areas. The rooms were immaculately clean and well designed. The additional facilities were a hit with our teens. Thank you for making our stay very pleasant. A home away from home.

reviews.title: ROAD TRIP
reviews.text: First stop on our Road Trip

reviews.title: Quality Hotel
reviews.text: This us a very slick Hotel, very welcoming. Room was spacious and space efficient, even space for a settee. Breakfast was varied and excellent attentative staff. Pool was a joy if one is looking to chill out !

reviews.title: Quality Hotel
reviews.text: Very impressed. This is a stylish Hotel. Rooms are nicely laid out and comfortable. Excellent breakfast. The sauna and swimming pool area is very relaxing and highly recommended. Will definately return !

reviews.title: Lobby et bar à rénover de fond en comble
reviews.text: Il hôtel est très bien placé, les chambres sont correctes. Mais le problème est le lobby et le bar Qui sont glauques Franchement demande une rénovation complète. Bien d’autres établissements à Hambourg au même prix sont splendides

reviews.title: bien mais
reviews.text: Hotel très correct dans l'ensemble tant qu'on ne demande rien au personnel.

reviews.title: Schönes u. modernes Hotel
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist gut gelegen. Das Hotel befindet sich in einem hervorragenden Zustand. Der Wellnessbereich ist angenehm und gut über den Fahrstuhl zu erreichen. Die Zimmer sind ausreichend groß und verfügen über ein angenehmes Bad (neuester Stand). Das gesamte Personal ist freundlich und hilfsbereit.

reviews.title: extrem kundenunfreundliches Buchungsmanagement!
reviews.text: die schieben das zwar auf Booking.com aber selbst haben die diese Art von Preisgestaltung auf ihrer Webseite - Umbuchungen sind manchen Kategorien ausgeschlossen- im Zweifel verliert man sein ganzes Geld - nie wieder in Sofitel Hotels!!!

reviews.title: OK
reviews.text:
Leider wurden wir vor Reiseantritt nicht informiert, dass der Spa-Bereich aufgrund von Sanierungsmaßnahmen geschlossen ist. Alternative war die Nutzung des Spa‘s eines anderen Hotels, das aber 15 min entfernt war.
Die Zimmer sind sehr einfach gehalten. 
Kenne bessere Sofitels für den Preis.

reviews.title: Sight Seeing
reviews.text:
Gute Lage,kleiner aber besonders angelegter Innenpool.
Der Weg zum Pool ist interessanter als der Pool selbst...

reviews.title: Top Lage
reviews.text:
Positiv: Sehr ruhige Zimmer ,bequeme Betten und ein tolles Frühstücksbuffet. 
Negativ: Sauberkeit im Zimmer .

reviews.title: Das Sofitel verdient jeden seiner Sterne.
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer, die Aussicht und die Nähe zur Alster.

reviews.title: Ausstattung gut Service weniger
reviews.text: Ausstattung war wirklich erstklassig was man vom Service nicht sagen konnte. Insbesondere beim Frühstück konnte man sehen, was Anspruch und Wirklichkeit betraf. Wir mussten am Samstagmorgen ca. 30 Minuten auf einen Platz warten und dem Personal war es nicht möglich mehrere Tisch abzuräumen und wieder einzudecken. Freundlichkeit der Mitarbeiter könnte verbessert werden. Lage und Ausstattung des Hotel sind sehr gut. Hotel ist jwirklich empfehlenswert
reviews.positives: Zimmerausstattung und Lage sprechen für das Hotel.

reviews.title: Enttäuschendes Frühstück
reviews.text: Dass beim Frühstück teilweise unansehnliche Speisen vom Vortag gereicht werden, dürfte in eiem Spitzenhotel auch zu Beginn der Frühstückszeit nicht passieren. Dann lieber weniger aber frische warme Speisen präsentieren.

reviews.title: Gute lage
reviews.text: Schöne zimmer gute lage

reviews.title: Weihnachtsshopping
reviews.text: Sehr nettes aufmerksames Personal insbesondere Frau Pöschel und der Concierge. Hat Spaß gemacht. Gerne wieder

reviews.title: Top Hotel in Top Lage
reviews.text: Siehe Überschrift!

reviews.title: Perfekt gelegen für City oder Business Trip
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist perfekt zentral gelegen und somit geeignet für City oder Business Trips. Speicherstadt, Stadzentrum, Innenalster, Elbe, Ratshaus, Bahnhof, alles in gehdistanz. Auch Cafés mit Frühstück und S- resp. U-Bahn Stationen sind in Gehdistanz. Das Spa hat ein sehr schönes Relax Bad. Sauna und Dampfbad welches kostenlos genutzt werden kann. Frühstück hatten wir jeweils in einem Café ausserhalb, können wir also nicht beurteilen. Personal sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tolles Hotel mit tollem Spa-Bereich und super Frühstücksbüffet

reviews.title: まずまずでした
reviews.text: 過ごしやすいホテルと思います

reviews.title: 街の中心にありアクセスが便利、部屋は快適
reviews.text:
電話が壊れていて、外に電話をかけることが出来ませんでした。
wifi無線lanが入っていて無料はありがたかったのですが、電波が途切れることが多かったです。
reviews.positives: 街の中心にありアクセスが便利、部屋は快適

reviews.title: 위치는 좋지만
reviews.text: 가격 대비 만족스럽진 않아요

reviews.title: 운하바로옆에서 디너는 환상적이었다.
reviews.text: 2층 숙소 가는길이 엘레베이터에서 내려서 다시 계단을 몇개 올라가는것이 불편하다.

reviews.title: hotel yang bagus
reviews.text: tempat menginap yang nyaman, beberapa menit ke HBF dengan taksi, jika ke hamburg saya pasti akan menginap dihotel ini
reviews.positives: hotel bersih, dekat pusat belanja dan keramaian,.

reviews.title: Долгий заезд и выезд
reviews.text:
Парковка , за 26 евро в сутки, не далеко от центра.
На 5 звёзд вообще не тянет, обслуживание при встрече и выезде ни какого.

reviews.title: Fantastisk flott rom. Gåavstand til handlegater
Veldig renselig, hyggelig, avslappende
reviews.text: Noe misferstårelse mellom agenten Agoda og hotel, men det ordner seg face 2 face!

reviews.title: Sofitel Am Alten Wall Hamburg Hotel
reviews.text: Veldig bra.

reviews.title: Levererar vad som förväntas
reviews.text: Väldigt bra & helt enl. förväntan

reviews.title: Super hotel
reviews.text: Meget fint men parkering meget dyrt

reviews.title: dejligt stille hotel med let adgang til hele byen
reviews.text:
super flotte suiter og alt fungere tæt adgang til havn og by 
ligger i et meget roligt kvarter en af de roligste hoteller jeg har boet i Hamborg
meget Børne venlig personale det eneste minus var dårlig restaurant anbefalinger fra hotellets consierge det var et minus
reviews.positives: store værelser og at man må have 2 børn med uden problemer visse andre 5 stjernet hoteller tilader det ikke

reviews.title: Top Service, Super lækker morgenmad og rummeligt værelse!
reviews.text:
Lækkert hotel som lever op til deres stjerner. Ligger 200 meter fra rådhusetorvet og 500 til havnedelen.
Dejligt spa i kælderen og lækkert lyst hotelværelse med god plads.
Servicen fra personalet er helt i top og overraskende nok taler den ene dansk ! 
Helt klar et besøg værd mere til december! :)

reviews.title: super designer hotel
reviews.text: vaerelset var klar tidligt om morgenen ved ankomst. vaerelset havde super udsigt over kanalen og det var rigtig hyggeligt at vaere der. sengene er nok de bedste senge jeg nogensinde har ligget i ! hotellet har et super laekkert pool omraade med damp sauna og det hele er super fedt designet og moderne uden at vaere for avantgarde. kan klart anbefales og kommer ogsaa helt sikkert igen.
